mapper.select: SELECT version, content_type, status, prompt_text, model, create_by, publish_by, publish_time, create_time, update_time FROM risk_prompt_version WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND content_type = #{contentType} ORDER BY publish_time DESC, version DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE risk_prompt_version SET status = #{toStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND content_type = #{contentType}
UPDATE risk_prompt_version SET status = #{status}, publish_by = #{publishBy}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE version = #{version}
